deviations.description: The process model allows for process termination both when the donor does not consent and when the donor retracts consent, as shown by the parallel gateway that always allows for retracting consent (see process model, page 1). However, Version 2 of the requirement only obligates termination when the donor does not consent, not when consent is retracted. Therefore, the process enforces a stricter rule than required by Version 2.
process_model_reference: parallel gateway allowing process termination upon consent retraction
